plans.name: Technology Select Sector SPDR
plans.invalidation: Close below $153.90 OR break of SMA50 ($141.08) invalidates the momentum thesis.

backers.rationale: Cautious constructive: clean uptrend with calm volatility.

Perfect stack: price > SMA20 > SMA50 > SMA200, separation 3.4% — cosmic trend intact.
Risk-on regime supports cyclical exposure.
Low coverage (5 articles) but sentiment +0.40 and price above SMA-50 — small edge before crowd arrives.
